info.description: Backend API for Family Care Digital Family Management Solution

password.description: Password must be at least 8 characters long and include at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number and one special character

refreshToken.description: A valid, non-expired refresh token previously issued by the API
Refresh token of the current device. If provided, only that session is revoked; otherwise all sessions of the user are revoked.

relationship.description: The creator's relationship within the family

message.example: Tôi cần giúp đỡ khẩn cấp

recordedAt.description: Thời điểm ghi nhận (ISO8601), mặc định là hiện tại

responseType.description: Chỉ chấp nhận VIEWED / CONFIRM_SAFE / NEED_HELP từ thành viên

resolutionNote.example: Đã xác nhận thành viên an toàn

planCode.description: Mã gói muốn nâng cấp (chỉ gói trả phí: PLUS/PREMIUM)
